TEXT.source: NTU Corpus stories for Kavalan, story: KavNr-pear_Haciang

S.FORM: yau paknanem baqian zinna.
S.TRANSL: 有一個老人。
There was an old man.

S.FORM: pak palumaan tu izau tu qaqanan tu zau tu.
S.TRANSL: 種了許多吃的東西。
(He) planted many things (fruits) to eat.

S.FORM: byabas zinna timangu teqaS ti ya penalumaanna tu zau tu byabas zinna nani.
S.TRANSL: 他種的芭樂已經成熟了。
The guavas he planted have ripened.

S.FORM: haw nayau usiq qyalakita ka zinna baqian ‘nay.
S.TRANSL: 好,那就去採吧。
Okay, then let’s go to pick (the guavas).

S.FORM: tu wiya ti.
S.TRANSL: (老人)就去了。
(He) started off.

S.FORM: mazas tu qanas.
S.TRANSL: 帶著一個籃子。
(He) carried a basket.

S.FORM: zau a izau zaqisan tu wiya ti zaqisanna ti a byabas ay yau qmyala’ nani.
S.TRANSL: 就去爬上了芭樂樹,採(芭樂)。
He went climbing on the guava tree to pick (guavas).

S.FORM: uzusa ti ya qawas ya qenyalaanna na.
S.TRANSL: 撿了兩大簍子。
He picked two baskets (of guavas).

S.FORM: yau a lazat a yau qmawkawiq tu sizi.
S.TRANSL: 有一個人牽著羊走來走去。
There was one man pulling a goat.

S.FORM: temala mlaziw tataanna taytaanna na ma qmyala haw tu byabas zinna na.
S.TRANSL: 經過，看到那個採芭樂的。
(He) passed by and saw the one picking guavas.

S.FORM: wiya ti ya lazat a yau a qmawit ay tu sizina.
S.TRANSL: 牽羊的走了。
The person who pulled the goat left.

S.FORM: timengna yau ti ya sunis a yau a mala mqa qitun mawtu.
S.TRANSL: 有一個小孩騎著腳踏車來。
There was a child who rode a bicycle coming along.

S.FORM: mlasiw ta baqian ‘nay yau tu qmyala tu byabas ‘nay.
S.TRANSL: (他)經過那個在採芭樂的老人那邊。
(He) went past where the old was picking guavas.

S.FORM: titaanna nani.
S.TRANSL: 他看著。
He took a look.

S.FORM: aw mana qanengi qanan qa zau a byabas a zau zinna sayza nani.
S.TRANSL: 喔,芭樂似乎很好吃。
Oh. It seems that guavas are good to eat (taste good).

S.FORM: ngidanna ala tu usiq na.
S.TRANSL: 他想拿一個。
He wanted to take one.

S.FORM: mengaRiw qaseminta zinna na.
S.TRANSL: 他心想:我們這些夠嗎?
He wondered whether it would be enough (for us).

S.FORM: madikud uman taytaanna yau zau saqanas.
S.TRANSL: 他回頭又看有一簍。
He turned back again and saw there was a basket.

S.FORM: wisisanna ti na pizyaanna tangayawan na qitunna.
S.TRANSL: 拿起來放在車子的前面。
He lifted it up and put it in front of his vehicle.

S.FORM: tu zau tu.
S.TRANSL: 車子的這個。
Vehicle, this…

S.FORM: izau zitinsya zinna zipung tu zau a qitunna zau.
S.TRANSL: 這部車就是日本所稱的自行車。
This is the vehicle called ‘bicycle’ in Japanese.

S.FORM: pizianna ti tangayawanna tu wiya ti mRaRiw.
S.TRANSL: 放在車前面之後，走了唷。
After he put (it) on his bike, he left.

S.FORM: Raynguanna baqian ‘nay yau a mzaqis sababaw a qmyala ta byabas ay yau nani.
S.TRANSL: 那個爬在樹上採芭樂的老人家根本不知道。
(The old man) who was picking guavas (up on the tree) did not know it.

S.FORM: syazi tabatasan na lazan nani.
S.TRANSL: 到了一個路段。
(When he) arrived halfway on the road.

S.FORM: yau a paknanem tazungan sunis.
S.TRANSL: 有一個女孩。
There was a girl.

S.FORM: simqatapung qaniyau mqa qitun nani.
S.TRANSL: 他們騎著腳踏車遇到。
They met each other, both riding bicycles.

S.FORM: bitisanna ya qubu yau tu msuRaw ti ya sunis a yau a.
S.TRANSL: 她搶他的帽子,小孩子跌倒了。
She robbed him of his hat, and the child fell.

S.FORM: m mya mRuziq ay tu byabas nani.
S.TRANSL: 那個小孩子就是偷芭樂的。
(The child is the one) who stole the guavas.

S.FORM: bibyak ti ya byabas a yau sa qawas.
S.TRANSL: 那一籃的水果掉了。
The basket of guavas dropped.

S.FORM: na timengna yau izau kaputna.
S.TRANSL: 還好他有朋友。
Fortunately, (he) had friends.

S.FORM: nayau mawRawRat tayan ta butuqbutuqan sayza nani.
S.TRANSL: (他們)好像在池塘玩耍的樣子。
(They) seemed to be playing at the pond.

S.FORM: yau ti mawtu mangmu taytaanna yau ti m msuRaw aizipna nani.
S.TRANSL: 看到他跌倒有來幫忙他。
Seeing him fall, they came to help him.

S.FORM: musipus ti ta zapanna ta mluzit ti sayza nayau mzuquq ta betuan nani.
S.TRANSL: 他揉他的腳,好像受傷的樣子,撞到石頭。
He rubbed his leg; maybe he got hurt. (He) stumbled over a stone.

S.FORM: yau ti pangmuan na kaputna.
S.TRANSL: 他的朋友幫他。
His friends helped him.

S.FORM: ya mazmun na kaputna ya izau.
S.TRANSL: 他有很多朋友。
His has lots of friends.

S.FORM: mangmu ay ta ta sepez taqaqanasan nani.
S.TRANSL: 幫忙裝在籃子裡。
Helping put (them) in the basket.

S.FORM: tu alaanna ti pizi taqitunan uman ngid qawi nani.
S.TRANSL: 拿了水果又再放回去車上。
(He) took (the fruits) and put (them) on the bicycle again.

S.FORM: timengna qawiya ti iku zinna sayza.
S.TRANSL: 他說,我走了。
‘I’m leaving,’ said he.

S.FORM: wiya ti ya kaputna qaya ngid sasaqay pasazui tabutuqan.
S.TRANSL: 他的朋友也走去湖邊玩了。
His friends also left for the pond to play there.

S.FORM: taytaanna yau qubu ‘nay nialaanna ‘nay na tazungan a yau ‘nay nani.
S.TRANSL: 他看到被女孩子搶的帽子還在。
He saw that the hat taken away by the girl was still there.

S.FORM: niuniusanna ti tu.
S.TRANSL: 他只好一直吹口哨。
He (could only) keep whistling.

S.FORM: m Renin nani yau qubusu zinna na kaputna nani.
S.TRANSL: 他回頭,他的朋友說,‘這邊有你的帽子’。
He turned back; his friends said, ‘Here is your hat.’

S.FORM: wiya ti tmadikud.
S.TRANSL: 他回去。
He went back.

S.FORM: timengna qatiw ita si.
S.TRANSL: 我們去的話。
If we go, …

S.FORM: bulakita tu byabas zinna tu.
S.TRANSL: 他說,我要給芭樂。
He said, ‘I will give guavas (to…).’

S.FORM: sinusiqanna ya kaputna tu byabas a yau tu.
S.TRANSL: 他分給他的朋友一人一個芭樂。
He gave each friend a guava.

S.FORM: wiya ti aizipna tangi nani.
S.TRANSL: 後來他就要離開了。
Now he was about to leave.

S.FORM: tmadikud ti ya kaputna nani.
S.TRANSL: 他的朋友又回來。
His friends came back.

S.FORM: niz qman tu byabasna.
S.TRANSL: 全部都在吃他的芭樂。
All were eating his guava.

S.FORM: taytaanna baqian a yau mai ti ya usiq qaqawas ay a yau a byabas ‘nay.
S.TRANSL: 老人看到有一籃芭樂不見了。
The old man saw that one basket of guavas disappeared.

S.FORM: wa qanizau haw mRuziq ay ta byabasku zinna ti.
S.TRANSL: 他想可能是這些小孩子偷我的芭樂。
‘Those (children) might have stolen my guavas,’ thought the old man.

S.FORM: sayza pamenganna pasisitaRanna baqian a yau a kaput na sunis a yau a izau zau a mRuziq ay tu byabas a yau nani.
S.TRANSL: 他只能瞪著那些偷了芭樂的小孩。
The old man could only stare at the children who had stolen the guavas.

S.FORM: pameng tmayta baqian a yau tu.
S.TRANSL: 那個老人只有看著。
The old man could only look (at them).

S.FORM: pameng ti m izau.
S.TRANSL: 只好,那個…
Only, then…

S.FORM: m tmaytayta ya baqian ‘nay mayu.
S.TRANSL: 那個老人一直看。
The old man kept looking (at them).

S.FORM: qapaRkita mai zinna ya sunis a yau mniz.
S.TRANSL: 他覺得應該要把他們全部抓起來,但是沒去抓。
'We should catch them all, but we didn’t,' said he.

S.FORM: tu nayau ma ya nipakunkuku timaimu zaka.
S.TRANSL: 我說給你們的話就這樣子。
That’s what I told you.
